speaker: speaker1
text: Hello , this is room 1205 . Our message lamp is flashing .

speaker: speaker2
text: I am sorry to have kept you waiting . Mr . Johns needs a telephone call from you .

speaker: speaker1
text: Would you bring the message to my room .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm afraid we have nobody available at the moment .

speaker: speaker1
text: Then I'll come down and pick up the message immediately .
